→ Bite: [d20:9+10=19 vs AC 15] HIT! 17 damage. Leonin — Unarmored Caster HP: 27/67

--- Leonin — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 5/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: HP CRITICAL (5/67). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Leonin — Unarmored Caster is affected by Greater Invisibility.
